children.label: A
children.text: the programs specified in section 1501(b) of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 1997 (; ; note);Public Law 104–201110 Stat. 273150 U.S.C. 23621See References in Text note below.1

children.label: B
children.text: the programs for which appropriations are authorized by section 3101(a)(2) of the Bob Stump National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2003 (; );Public Law 107–314116 Stat. 2729

children.label: C
children.text: programs authorized by and programs authorized by ; andsection 5854 of title 22section 5902 of title 22

children.label: D
children.text: a program of any agency of the Federal Government having a purpose similar to that of any of the programs identified in subparagraphs (A) through (C), as designated by the United States Coordinator for the Prevention of Weapons of Mass Destruction Proliferation and Terrorism and the head of the agency.
The terms “weapons of mass destruction” and “WMD” mean chemical, biological, and nuclear weapons, and chemical, biological, and nuclear materials used in the manufacture of such weapons.

children.label: i

children.label: ii

children.label: iii
